title: payena polyandra
intro: Payena polyandra, also known as the Payena polyandra plant or Payena, is a flowering plant species in the family Sapotaceae. It is a plant native to Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Payena polyandra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is said to have potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system.
